content:
Adrian said in #boston > map of places we've met:

also for some reason i now want to recommend we go to Roccos italian cucina right on the tip of north end because it would make our map almost a perfect circle of locations that we have met before LOL
and then for good measure we could do something in charlestown and then chinatown to make it even moreobvious
if we got very ambitious over a lot of months we could maybe trace out some approximation of the OSI logo if we wanted to haha
